use_cases: Displaying contextual forms or inputs in a sliding overlay panel
Showing confirmation dialogs with customizable alert variants
Presenting settings or configuration options without navigating away
Revealing detailed information or notifications in a dismissible sheet
Providing focused workflow overlays for data entry or review tasks
ai_summary: A flexible sheet/drawer overlay component with variant-based styling for different alert states. Features multiple appearance modes (solid, outline, light, stroke) and size options, using class-variance-authority for consistent theming. Includes built-in close functionality with a dismiss button, making it ideal for modal-like interactions in web applications.
